key_evidence: 782 NEC (necrotizing enterocolitis) cases pending in MDL 3026 as of April 2026; $495M verdict July 2024 + $70M April 2026 Cook County verdict against Abbott on Similac formulas.
Abbott continues to state 'no scientific evidence' links formulas to NEC despite verdicts — persistent AB1/AB2 harm-acknowledgment floor pattern.
2025 Scarborough Maine whistleblower lawsuit alleges ADA, Maine Human Rights Act, and Maine Whistleblower Protection Act violations against two former employees who flagged defective COVID-19 tests.
2022 Similac/Alimentum/EleCare powder formula recall (Salmonella, Cronobacter) at Sturgis Michigan facility was a major A1/A5 detection failure.
Medical device innovation (FreeStyle Libre CGM, pacemakers) represents genuine SYS strength supporting 68.8.
F500 sector DEI 65% disclosure decline applies.
human_review_rationale: Two-band downgrade (exemplary->functional) from rank #4 is consequential. Published 87.4 appears reputationally driven; evidence strongly supports Functional band. Recommend human review before applying.
